behavior.coordination: Submit a 'Proposed State' Handshake to SSoT_Storage. Reference MANDATE_06 and MANDATE_13.

processing_protocol.step_1_audit: Consume user fields. Verify mathematical integrity (Price vs Close, RSI vs Label).
processing_protocol.step_2_enrich: Populate 'scrutiny_audit' and 'hard_catalyst' objects as defined in Rules_Engine > ENH_32.
processing_protocol.step_3_consensus: Execute MANDATE_13 via ENH_40 (Meta-Arbiter). Calculate Agreement Score (S_A).
processing_protocol.step_4_veto_check: MANDATORY: IF RED_TEAM_PESSIMIST.fatal_flaw_score >= 8 THEN SET S_A = 0.0 AND TRIGGER ABORT_PROTOCOL.
processing_protocol.step_5_score: Calculate final technical_health_score using Local Logic Gates (see below).
processing_protocol.step_6_prune: Discard all transient session data (gaps, volumes, PM/AH prices) after scoring to prevent SSoT bloat.

internal_logic_gates.reference_rule: See Rules_Engine > MANDATE_13 for weighting logic.
internal_logic_gates.dealer_posture_logic: If net_gex_total > 0: LONG_GAMMA; < 0: SHORT_GAMMA; else: NEUTRAL.

rules: Subtract 15 if Supply Chain flags are active (ENH_10).
Subtract 30 if Trade_State == EXIT AND Drawdown_Gap < 2.5% (Alpha-Friction Violation).

tickers.note: Structure MUST match SSoT_Storage > portfolio_snapshot schema exactly.
